goal: 修复 cutover release gate 的 rollback 时间戳测试

summary.title: 修复 cutover 回滚验收时间戳漂移
summary.what: 修正 MV3 rollback 验收单测，不再假设固定的 2026-05-27T00:00:00.000Z snapshot 会一直是 latest trusted rollback target；测试改为读取 skills.install update response 里的 previousVersion，并用该真实 snapshot 验证 summary、rollback response 和 audit.tail。同时在 release cutover decision packet 记录 PR #2 已由人工 merge 接受 repo-side Level 2 evidence pack。
summary.why: PR #2 merge 后重新运行 release:cutover:status 时，repo-wide check 因当前真实时间越过测试写死时间而失败。实现行为是正确的：skills.install update 会自动 snapshot 更新前 package，latest_trusted 应选择最新 trusted snapshot。测试应锚定运行时返回的真实 rollback target，而不是依赖会过期的未来时间。
summary.user_goal: 修复 cutover release gate 的 rollback 时间戳测试

decisions.point: rollback target 应该如何断言
decisions.chose: 从 skills.install update response 的 previousVersion 读取 rollback target，再贯穿 summary、rollback response 和 audit.tail 断言
decisions.rationale: 这验证了产品实际行为：更新前自动 snapshot 是可回滚目标，且不受当前日期影响。
rejected: 把固定 trustedVersionId 改成另一个更晚的未来时间
改实现去偏好手工 snapshot 而不是最新 trusted snapshot

decisions.point: PR #2 merge 后的决策记录
decisions.chose: 在 release cutover decision packet 增加 External Acceptance Decision，记录 accepted_at、merged PR 和 merge commit
decisions.rationale: release packet 要成为 cutover 交接入口；人工 merge 已经发生，应把 external acceptance 事实写回真相源，同时保留 old-mainline switch/release execution 为单独边界。

decisions.chose: 检查并分类为不阻塞本轮修复
decisions.rationale: int_58ebabe7 是 5 月 15 日 Mainline/skills.install payload 收口，命中文件不包含本轮修改的 MV3 manifest rollback 单测；notes rewrite drift 影响旧 proposal/coverage 信号，不影响当前失败复现。

review_notes: 复现失败：bunx vitest run apps/mv3-shell/test/manifest.spec.ts -t 'rolls back an installed package' --reporter=verbose 在修复前失败，rollbackTarget 选择当前时间的自动 snapshot。
验证通过：同一聚焦 rollback 单测通过。
验证通过：bun run release:cutover:status 的 acceptance、extension build、真实 Chromium MV3 smoke、repo-wide check 均通过；提交前唯一 blocker 是 worktree has uncommitted changes。

architectural_claims: skills.install update creates the authoritative rollback snapshot for latest_trusted selection; tests should assert against that returned snapshot rather than a fixed timestamp.
behavioral_changes: Rollback acceptance test is deterministic after 2026-05-27T00:00:00.000Z and continues to verify summary, rollback response, invoke readback, and audit evidence against the actual previousVersion snapshot.
Release cutover packet records that PR #2 was merged as external acceptance of the repo-side Level 2 evidence pack.
migration_notes: Old-mainline switch / release execution remains a separate explicit step after the recorded PR merge decision.
